ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "UP", service: "clouderby-client-app", mode: "remote (clouderby-jdbc)", targetServer: p('clouderby.host') ++ ":" ++ p('clouderby.port'), secure: p('clouderby.secure'), timestamp: now() }

db:select.doc:name: Bench select default fetch
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, value FROM bench_t ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { rowCount: sizeOf(payload), first: payload[0], last: payload[-1] }

db:select.doc:name: Bench select fetch=100
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, value FROM bench_t ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { rowCount: sizeOf(payload), first: payload[0], last: payload[-1] }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Testing connection to remote clouderby server

db:select.doc:name: Test query
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS test FROM SYS.SYSSCHEMAS WHERE SCHEMANAME = 'APP'

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Connection successful via clouderby-jdbc", targetServer: p('clouderby.host') ++ ":" ++ p('clouderby.port'), secure: p('clouderby.secure') }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Fetching tables from remote clouderby server

db:select.doc:name: Query tables
db:select.db:sql: SELECT T.TABLENAME AS name FROM SYS.SYSTABLES T JOIN SYS.SYSSCHEMAS S ON T.SCHEMAID = S.SCHEMAID WHERE S.SCHEMANAME = 'APP' AND T.TABLETYPE = 'T' ORDER BY T.TABLENAME

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", tables: payload map $.NAME, count: sizeOf(payload) }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Fetching customers from remote clouderby server

db:select.doc:name: Select customers
db:select.db:sql: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE, EMAIL, PHONE FROM MDM_CUSTOMERS ORDER BY CUSTOMER_CODE FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", customers: payload, count: sizeOf(payload) }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Fetching products from remote clouderby server

db:select.doc:name: Select products
db:select.db:sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, UNIT, UNIT_PRICE FROM MDM_PRODUCTS ORDER BY PRODUCT_CODE FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", products: payload, count: sizeOf(payload) }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Fetching orders from remote clouderby server

db:select.doc:name: Select orders
db:select.db:sql: SELECT ID, ORDER_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, STATUS, ORDER_DATE, TOTAL, CURRENCY FROM SAL_SALES_ORDERS ORDER BY ID DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", orders: payload, count: sizeOf(payload) }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Fetching inventory from remote clouderby server

db:select.doc:name: Select inventory
db:select.db:sql: SELECT INVENTORY_ID, PRODUCT_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT, STATUS FROM INV_INVENTORY ORDER BY INVENTORY_ID FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", inventory: payload, count: sizeOf(payload) }

logger.message: [CLIENT] Testing transaction with try scope, fail=#[attributes.queryParams.fail default 'false']

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create test table
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE tx_test_mule (id INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(200), value INTEGER)

logger.message: [TX-TEST] Raising simulated error for rollback test
[TX-TEST] Error occurred, transaction will be rolled back: #[error.description]

db:select.doc:name: Count records
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM tx_test_mule

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, transactionCommitted: true, recordCount: payload[0].cnt, message: "Transaction committed successfully. Records: " ++ (payload[0].cnt as String) }

db:select.doc:name: Count records after rollback
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM tx_test_mule

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, transactionCommitted: false, transactionRolledBack: true, recordCount: payload[0].cnt, message: "Transaction rolled back due to simulated error. Records: " ++ (payload[0].cnt as String) ++ " (should be 0)" }

db:select.doc:name: Select customer by ID
db:select.db:sql: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE, EMAIL, PHONE FROM MDM_CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = :customerId

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", customer: payload[0] default null, found: !isEmpty(payload) }

db:select.doc:name: Search product
db:select.db:sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, UNIT, UNIT_PRICE FROM MDM_PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCT_CODE LIKE :code

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", searchCode: attributes.queryParams.code default '', products: payload, count: sizeOf(payload) }

db:select.doc:name: Search inventory
db:select.db:sql: SELECT INVENTORY_ID, PRODUCT_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT, STATUS FROM INV_INVENTORY WHERE PRODUCT_ID = COALESCE(:productId, PRODUCT_ID) ORDER BY INVENTORY_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "clouderby-client-app (via clouderby-jdbc)", params: { productId: attributes.queryParams.productId, warehouseId: attributes.queryParams.warehouseId, status: attributes.queryParams.status, offset: attributes.queryParams.offset default 0, limit: attributes.queryParams.limit default 20 }, inventory: payload, count: sizeOf(payload) }

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create db_test table
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE db_test (id INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(200), value INTEGER, category VARCHAR(50), updated_at VARCHAR(50))

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create db_script_test table
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE db_script_test (id INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, label VARCHAR(200), score INTEGER)

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create db_poll_events table
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE db_poll_events (id INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, event_name VARCHAR(200), created_at VARCHAR(50))

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create db_poll_picked table
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE db_poll_picked (id INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, original_id INTEGER, event_name VARCHAR(200), picked_at VARCHAR(50))

db:insert.doc:name: Seed db_test row 1
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO db_test (name, value, category, updated_at) VALUES (:name, :value, :category, :updatedAt)

db:insert.doc:name: Seed db_test row 2
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO db_test (name, value, category, updated_at) VALUES (:name, :value, :category, :updatedAt)

db:insert.doc:name: Seed db_test row 3
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO db_test (name, value, category, updated_at) VALUES (:name, :value, :category, :updatedAt)

db:select.doc:name: Verify db_test
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_test ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Test tables created and seeded", tables: ["db_test", "db_script_test", "db_poll_events"], seedData: payload, seedCount: sizeOf(payload) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

db:update.doc:name: Update by name
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE db_test SET value = :value, updated_at = :updatedAt WHERE name = :name

db:select.doc:name: Verify update
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_test ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:update", affectedRows: vars.affectedRows, currentData: payload }

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- [ { name: "Delta", value: 400, category: "C", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} }, { name: "Echo", value: 500, category: "C", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} }, { name: "Foxtrot", value: 600, category: "D", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} } ]

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Bulk insert 3 rows
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO db_test (name, value, category, updated_at) VALUES (:name, :value, :category, :updatedAt)

db:select.doc:name: Verify bulk insert
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_test ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:bulk-insert", bulkResult: vars.bulkResult, currentData: payload, totalRows: sizeOf(payload) }

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- [ { name: "Alice", category: "X", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} }, { name: "Bob", category: "X", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} }, { name: "Charlie", category: "Y", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} } ]

db:bulk-update.doc:name: Bulk update categories
db:bulk-update.db:sql: UPDATE db_test SET category = :category, updated_at = :updatedAt WHERE name = :name

db:select.doc:name: Verify bulk update
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_test ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:bulk-update", bulkResult: vars.bulkResult, currentData: payload, totalRows: sizeOf(payload) }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- [ { name: "Delta" }, { name: "Echo" }, { name: "Foxtrot" } ]

db:select.doc:name: Verify bulk delete
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_test ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:bulk-delete", bulkResult: vars.bulkResult, currentData: payload, totalRows: sizeOf(payload) }

db:select.doc:name: Verify script execution
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_script_test ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:execute-script", scriptResult: vars.scriptResult, currentData: payload, totalRows: sizeOf(payload) }

logger.message: [DB-TEST] Testing db:stored-procedure (expected to fail - CallableStatement not implemented)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:stored-procedure", message: "Stored procedure executed (unexpected)", result: payload }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:stored-procedure", supported: false, message: "Stored procedure not supported (expected - CallableStatement not implemented in clouderby)", errorType: error.errorType.identifier, errorMessage: error.description }

logger.message: [DB-TEST] on-table-row picked up event: id=#[payload.id], event_name=#[payload.event_name], created_at=#[payload.created_at]

db:insert.doc:name: Record picked event
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO db_poll_picked (original_id, event_name, picked_at) VALUES (:originalId, :eventName, :pickedAt)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

db:insert.doc:name: Insert poll event

db:select.doc:name: Get all events
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_poll_events ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Event inserted - on-table-row will pick it up within 30 seconds", insertResult: vars.insertResult, allEvents: payload, eventCount: sizeOf(payload) }

db:query-single.doc:name: Query single row
db:query-single.db:sql: SELECT id, name, value, category, updated_at FROM db_test ORDER BY id FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:query-single", message: "Returns a single Map (not a List)", row: payload, payloadType: typeOf(payload) }

db:select.doc:name: Get picked events
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM db_poll_picked ORDER BY id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, processor: "db:on-table-row (listener)", message: if (sizeOf(payload) > 0) "on-table-row picked up " ++ (sizeOf(payload) as String) ++ " event(s)" else "No events picked yet - wait up to 30 seconds after inserting a poll-event", pickedEvents: payload, pickedCount: sizeOf(payload) }
